error_signature: date comparison fails due to time component
title: Date range filter fails due to time component in comparison
symptom: The date range filter on the datagrid does not return expected results when comparing dates from Xano due to the inclusion of time in the timestamp.
applies_when: Using a date range filter on a datagrid
Timestamps from Xano include time components
not_this_if: Dates are compared without time components
Using a date-only format for both inputs
root_cause: The comparison between the date selected in the date range picker and the timestamp from Xano fails because the timestamp includes hours, minutes, and seconds, which affects the comparison logic.
fix_steps: Set the hour, minutes, and seconds of the date from the date range picker to 23:59:59 for the end date.
Ensure that the start date is compared correctly by adjusting its time component as needed.
agent_instruction: Adjust the time components of the date range picker values to ensure proper comparison with Xano timestamps.
